# Daniel Cardenas — okubuke

> Fullstack software developer specialized in Go, Java, React and DevOps. Portfolio: okubukee.github.io/Portfolio

## About
Daniel Cardenas (okubuke) is a fullstack developer with 2+ years of experience building web applications, CLI tools, and software solutions. Passionate about creating elegant, functional digital experiences.

## Stack
- **Languages:** Java, Go, JavaScript, Kotlin, Python, C#
- **Frontend:** React, Tailwind CSS, CSS3
- **Backend:** Spring Boot, Flask, Hibernate, REST API
- **Databases:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQLite, Firebase
- **DevOps:** Git, GitHub, Docker, CI/CD, Linux, Bash, NixOS
- **Game Dev:** Unity, Godot, Lua
- **AI & ML:** LLMs

## Projects
- **Terranova** — Modular Discord bot with moderation, auto-roles and custom commands, paired with a real-time web dashboard. (Go, Docker, SQLite, React)
- **Xilo** — Open-source vault for sensitive data with local AES-256-GCM encryption, no external server dependency. (Go, Fyne, Argon2id)
- **LogicMind** — Interactive algorithm visualizer with step-by-step animations for search and sorting algorithms. (Python, Flask, React, Docker)
- **Chromp** — Web color toolkit for designers: palette generation, accessibility contrast checking, multi-format export. (Python, Flask, React, Docker)
- **Swapify** — Fullstack marketplace built during a professional internship with auth, listings, swap system and admin panel. (Kotlin, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, React, Docker)
- **Portfolio** — This portfolio — terminal aesthetics, canvas animations, multi-language support (ES/PT/EN), interactive terminal. (React, Vite, CSS3)

## Stats
- 2+ years programming
- 6 projects built
- Open to work
